{{CargoRelic
|name=Food Safety Certificate
|class_id=20942
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Issued by the Food Safety Authority, this certificate is presented in a formal format with professional typography. It contains the seal and certification marks of authoritative institutions, enhancing its credibility and authority. It's an essential item for anyone in the food industry.
|fame=33
|art=16
|fth=13
|civ=15
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail HP +10<br>Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail DEF +1<br>New Dishes Created: 480/480
|ss2=Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail HP +20<br>Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail DEF +2<br>New Dishes Created: 480/480
|ss3=Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail HP +30<br>Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail DEF +3<br>New Dishes Created: 480/480
|ss4=Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail HP +30<br>Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail DEF +3<br>New Dishes Created: 480/480
|ss7=Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail HP +30<br>Per 10 new Dishes created, Snail DEF +3<br>New Dishes Created: 480/480<br> (Awakened)
}}
